ignored_examples.snippet: I am still getting Zoca booking requests

cause_analysis.narrative: Ashen Salon churned on 2026-02-24 after 224 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-08 via email — 16 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 16 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-02-24 via sms, client wrote: "I am still getting Zoca booking requests…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Hey Courtney! Let me quickly check that from my end and get back to you
I am still getting Zoca booking requests
I have taken care of it:)
We understand that waiting can be challenging, and we appreciate your patience. It will take 48 to 72 hours, after which you will receive an official email from us.
So how do we move forward?
Yes
I am still getting Zoca requests so it\'s not taken care of?
Hi Courtney! I hope you’re doing okay. We had a meeting with Ashley yesterday, and she expressed her desire to proceed with the cancellation.
I can now?
Let me know when a good time today is.

For that Courtney - we’ll just need to schedule a brief offboarding call so we can securely hand back all access to your profile and ensure everything is properly transitioned. We’ll be there to guide you through each step and make it hassle-free:)
Hi can you please confirm cancellation
Ok great. Tomorrow?
Sure what time are you available?
Hey Courtney! I’m so sorry I missed your call. Do let me know when is a good time to chat today
